BELOW - Enum constant in enum class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE
Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
buildChoiceDescriptionDataFromDirectory(String, DirectoryListFilterType, DirectoryListOrderType, boolean, String, boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
From the given directory list the directory entries as strings subject to the controls
buildChoiceDescriptionDataFromDirectory(Path, DirectoryListFilterType, DirectoryListOrderType, boolean, String, boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
From the given directory list the directory entries as strings subject to the controls
buildChoiceDescriptionDataFromEnumClass(Class<? extends Enum<T>>) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Given the enum class build a ChoiceDescriptionData representing all of the constants in the enum
buildChoiceDescriptionDataFromEnumValues(Enum<T>[]) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Given an array of possible the enum constants build a ChoiceDescriptionData representing the supplied values
buildChoiceDescriptionDataFromSampleEnumValue(Enum<T>) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Given an enum constant builds a choice description data for all the values of the enum class, setting the specific value of the enum constant as the default
buildChoiceDescriptionDataFromSampleEnumValue(Enum<T>, boolean) - Static method in class timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils
Given an enum constant builds a choice description data for all the values of the enum class, if setAsDefault is true setting the specific value of the enum constant as the default
